76363.subject: CLARITY Act Text Lands, Ethics Fight Begins
76363.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

Here are the biggest news in crypto and DeFi:

* **[The crypto industry](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/crypto-industry-pushes-for-senate-vote-on-new-clarity-act-text-as-democrats-blast-ethics-plan)**[ pushes for a Senate vote on the new CLARITY Act text](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/crypto-industry-pushes-for-senate-vote-on-new-clarity-act-text-as-democrats-blast-ethics-plan)

* **[An attacker](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/attacker-drains-usd24m-in-usdc-from-afx-bridge-on-arbitrum)**[ drains ~$24M in USDC from the AFX bridge on Arbitrum](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/attacker-drains-usd24m-in-usdc-from-afx-bridge-on-arbitrum)

* **[Robinhood Chain](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/robinhood-chain-overtakes-base-on-daily-active-users-three-weeks-after-launch)**[ overtakes Base on daily active users](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/robinhood-chain-overtakes-base-on-daily-active-users-three-weeks-after-launch)

* **[Tokenized stocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/tokenized-stocks-hit-records-across-every-major-venue-as-sector-reaches-usd2-3b)**[ hit records across every major venue ](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/tokenized-stocks-hit-records-across-every-major-venue-as-sector-reaches-usd2-3b)

* **[Franklin Templeton](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/franklin-templeton-says-altcoins-are-key-to-the-agentic-ai-trade)**[ says altcoins are key to the agentic-AI trade](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/franklin-templeton-says-altcoins-are-key-to-the-agentic-ai-trade)

The crypto market-structure bill finally has text. Now the fight is over one provision ‚Äî how hard to police government officials' crypto conflicts ‚Äî and it is the piece that decides whether the bill clears the Senate.

Senate Republicans released the [616-page merged CLARITY Act draft](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/crypto-industry-pushes-for-senate-vote-on-new-clarity-act-text-as-democrats-blast-ethics-plan), and **Coinbase**, the **Blockchain Association**, and the **DeFi Education Fund** urged a quick vote before the August recess. Key Democrats pushed back hard: Sen. **Angela Alsobrooks** called the draft's DOJ-led ethics enforcement "wild and unserious and stone-cold crazy."

The ethics provision is the whole ballgame. Everything else in the bill has broad support; whether a workable conflict-of-interest regime can be written is what determines if market structure gets 60 votes this session or slips past the recess into the fall.

**Read more below!**

‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî‚Äî

Caption:

76360.subject: üü™ In defense of markets that sometimes close
76360.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

‚ÄúWe just needed to make it to the weekend.‚Äù
_‚Äî __Charles Smith, Head of Business Development, Morgan Stanley_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/82699fce-363e-40c4-b638-bddcdf56f25c/image.png?t=1784755110)
Caption: 

# In defense of markets that sometimes close

Heading into the Columbus Day weekend of 2008, Morgan Stanley looked likely to become the next domino to fall in the Great Financial Crisis.

The bank began the week with $130 billion of cash on the books, which management believed was more than enough to weather the storm.¬Ý

But the hedge funds whose withdrawals had sealed the fate of Bear Stearns, Lehman Brothers, and Merrill Lynch were now pulling their money from Morgan Stanley, too ‚Äî $65 billion of it in a single day.

It was a bank run, and the only thing that seemed likely to stop it was an influx of equity capital from a large investor.

‚ÄúIf we didn‚Äôt do a deal, it was over,‚Äù CEO John Mack [said](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iPsiYIT79ig) later. ‚ÄúWe couldn‚Äôt stay in business.‚Äù

Fortunately, Mack had agreed to a deal. 

Two weeks earlier, Japan‚Äôs Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG), the second-largest bank in the world with $1 trillion of customer deposits, had agreed to buy 21% of Morgan Stanley for $9 billion.¬Ý

Unfortunately, the deal hadn‚Äôt closed yet.¬Ý

And the market increasingly doubted it ever would. The deal valued Morgan Stanley at $25.25 a share, but investors did not seem convinced: the shares closed at just $14.22 the day it was announced.

Nine days later, they had fallen to below $10.

This was a problem.

The more the shares went down, the less likely the deal was to close. The less likely it was to close, the more the shares went down.

Even worse: the more the shares went down, the more customers withdrew their money. The more‚Ä¶ well, you get the idea.

Morgan Stanley was at the mercy of its stock price, which traded lower day after day.

‚ÄúWe just needed to make it to the weekend,‚Äù Smith said later.

The weekend was a circuit breaker ‚Äî a two-day window for Morgan Stanley to close the deal with MUFG without having to worry about where its shares were trading.

On Saturday, MUFG said it remained committed to investing but

Good evening, An FDA panel will meet starting Thursday to consider whether to recommend legal production of seven peptides, and it‚Äôs a major event for ‚Äúthe who‚Äôs who of the peptide space,‚Äù according to Shaun Noorian, founder and CEO of Empower Pharmacy. For compounding pharmacies like Empower, telehealth giant like Hims & Hers and a slew of others, a potential multi-billion-dollar market could soon be in reach. Here‚Äôs what to know. Thanks for reading! 76358.subject: The Daily Degen - July 22nd, 2026
76358.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-july-22nd-2026

Happy Wednesday friends! Lots of stuff going on!
Let‚Äôs get after it!
As always‚Ä¶ stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom‚Ä¶ and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.329T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $706.63
Gold: $4134.90
Silver: $59.73
Oil (WTI): $86.97
US 10Y Treasury: 4.663%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 39
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Take note fine frogs! @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/c9b31b57-cf95-405d-bee6-4bfeef21f546?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] just turned three years old!
(indeed, you can see your humble editor wishing them happy birthday in the top-left portion of the screenshot from the video at 0:21 below!) 
Their tenure has been marked by all sorts of bullish developments, and most recently the biggest has been RWA‚Äôs!
Indeed, Mantle‚Äôs RWA history starts way back in 2023, when Ondo and their tokenized treasuries product $USDY first landed on Mantle‚Ä¶
Then came their MI4 fund‚Ä¶
And from there all sorts of huge advancements over the last year, including tokenized equities via @xStocksFi and @Fluxion_network, surging institutional capital focus via Aave and Maple Finance, and- mostly recently- pre-IPO vaults via @OpenstockInc!
This Openstock development is an especially big victory, positioning Mantle at the absolute forefront of the RWA race!
It is just one area that Mantle is stacking W‚Äôs in though, and you can learn more about everything else they are doing in their recent H1 breakdown [ https://substack.com/redirect/94a0c2d3-7cf7-454a-82fc-1ed7ed27b0fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
Also make sure to follow @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/c9b31b57-cf95-405d-bee6-4bfeef21f546?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on Twitter/X, and stay tuned as we keep shining a light on everything that‚Äôs happening in their ecosystem!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $100M TVL include Robinhood Chain, Monad, and Tempo. 
Protocols are also mixed today. Fastest-growing protocols on the weekly with at least $10M TVL include Twyne, Lombard, and Strata.

PHOTO: CATHLIN MCCULLOUGH


 An interview with Elon Musk


 Zanny Minton Beddoes

Editor-in-chief


 Elon Musk doesn’t dither. When I saw him a few months ago at an event in California, I suggested he come on The Insider. He told me to get in touch with him after the SpaceX IPO. I did—via a direct message on X, his social-media platform—and within 24 hours of him thumbs-upping my message someon
